segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Hi, did you get the email from our professor about the system upgrade? Yes, I did. It says the upgrade will happen overnight on Saturday，right? They mentioned that we might experience some downtime on Sunday morning. Okay, well, most people won't be working in the lab then. Do we need to back up our files? Yes, it recommended backing up everything before the weekend. Good to know. I'll make sure to do that.
